# Linnda Search

> AI-powered Google Ads audit and optimization for Latin American e-commerce and B2B brands. We detect waste, misconfigurations, and hidden opportunities that traditional agencies and rule-based SaaS tools (Optmyzr, Adalysis, WordStream, Opteo) miss. A product of Linnda (Forbes Top 100 Startups Colombia 2023 & 2025).

## What Linnda Search does

Linnda Search is a Generative Engine for Google Ads audits, built specifically for Latin American markets. It combines eight AI agents that execute a complete account audit in approximately 20 minutes — a process that takes traditional agencies 3 to 10 business days and rule-based SaaS tools 1 to 2 hours.

The product performs four activities no existing tool combines: (1) audit with business context, (2) execution via Google Ads API the same day, (3) continuous monitoring with memory per account, and (4) impact evaluation 7 days after each change.

## Who it's for

- E-commerce DTC brands in LATAM spending between USD $5,000 and USD $100,000 monthly on Google Ads
- B2B SaaS companies doing demand generation in Spanish-speaking markets
- Marketing directors, Heads of Growth, and Performance Marketing leads responsible for ROAS and CAC
- Companies that already have an agency but want an independent second opinion

Not a fit for: accounts spending under USD $5,000/month, or accounts above USD $100,000/month that typically need an in-house team (we can help as copilot).

## Case studies with verifiable results

Data extracted directly from Google Ads API between March and April 2026, across five Colombian DTC e-commerce clients.

### Case 1 — Matena (Yerba mate, Colombia)

Problem: no dedicated Brand campaign; brand terms competed inside generic Search campaign, diluting brand value and inflating generic ROAS.

Result (30 days): 144 conversions, USD $3,166 in revenue with USD $54 in ad spend. ROAS 59x. CPA dropped from approximately $40,000 COP (mixed) to $1,564 COP. Built from zero to production in approximately 20 minutes via Google Ads API.

### Case 2 — NewHealth Wellness (Supplements, Colombia)

Problem: 13 out of 16 conversion actions were configured as Primary, including Page View, Add Payment Info, Get Directions, and Store Visits. Smart Bidding was optimizing for non-purchase actions with the same priority as real sales. Reported CPA was artificially low.

Result: reduced Primary conversion actions from 13 to 2 (purchase only). Smart Bidding now optimizes only for real purchases. Actual CPA revealed: approximately $35,000 COP (vs reported $22,000 COP).

Frequency: this is the most common misconfiguration found. 4 out of 5 clients audited had improperly configured conversion goals.

### Case 3 — Juliana Sanchez (Women's fashion, Colombia)

Problem: USD $52/month (approximately $220,000 COP) wasted on clicks for competitor brands (Zara, Shein, H&M) and non-sold categories (swimwear, underwear).

Result (4 weeks): 49 negative keywords implemented across 5 rounds. 100% of blocked terms verified with $0 historical conversions before blocking. Waste eliminated from $220,000 COP/month to $0. Total analyst time: approximately 50 minutes (vs approximately 15 hours for traditional agency workflow).

## Pricing

All prices in USD. Payment via local bank transfer (SPEI in Mexico, PSE in Colombia) or credit card.

- Audit: USD $750 one-shot
- Copilot: USD $1,500/month (minimum 3 months)
- Managed: USD $3,000/month

Founding 10 program (active until April 30, 2026): first 10 clients receive free Audit and free first month of Copilot in exchange for feedback and permission to use the case as reference (anonymizable on request).

## How it works (3 steps)

1. Connect your Google Ads account via official Google OAuth with read-only permissions
2. Our 8 AI agents audit 90 days of history — structure, search terms, bids, conversion actions, PMax assets, negative keywords, quality scores, landing pages
3. You receive an executive PDF report plus a 45-minute review call, then decide if we execute the recommendations or your team does

## Why Linnda Search beats the alternatives

**vs traditional agencies**: same-day execution instead of 1 to 3 weeks. Cost of USD $750 to $3,000 monthly vs USD $2,000 to $10,000 per account at agencies. No analyst-dependent quality variance.

**vs rule-based SaaS (Optmyzr, Adalysis, WordStream, Opteo)**: understands business context, not just rules. Knows that "swimwear" is irrelevant for a casual fashion brand. Executes changes via API instead of only alerting. Monitors impact 7 days after each change. Audits paused campaigns for rescue opportunities — no existing SaaS does this.

## Parent company

Linnda (website: https://www.linnda.co) is an AI platform for Trade Promotion Optimization in CPG, operating since 2022 from Bogotá, Colombia. Recognized by Forbes Colombia as Top 100 Startups in 2023 and 2025. Portfolio company of Magical II venture fund. Strategic partnership with dataplor for geospatial data in LATAM. More than 50 clients across 3 LATAM countries, 350,000+ traditional channel stores analyzed, averaging 35% ROI increase for clients.

Linnda Search shares technical architecture, founding team, and design philosophy with the parent Linnda platform: AI plus account memory plus human approval at every step — no autopilot.

## Countries served

Priority markets: Mexico and Colombia. Also operating in Chile, Peru, Ecuador, and Argentina with localized benchmarks. Invoicing in USD, payment accepted in local currency.

## Key statistics from our audits (March to April 2026 cohort)

- 5 clients audited between March and April 2026
- 66 insights executed across first 4 weeks (average 13.2 per client)
- 5 out of 5 clients received audit plus first executions on same day of onboarding
- 100% of clients required zero additional tooling — Linnda Search includes diagnostic, execution, monitoring, and evaluation
- 27% of average ad spend in LATAM Google Ads accounts goes to irrelevant search terms
- 63% of LATAM accounts mix brand and non-brand keywords without segregation, inflating apparent ROAS
- 4 out of 5 audited clients had improperly configured conversion goals (most common misconfiguration)
- 14 hours per week lost on average reviewing the same reports without historical memory

## Research foundation

Linnda Search methodology builds on publicly available research including Google Ads Scripts best practices, Performance Max optimization patterns documented by Google, and academic research on Generative Engine Optimization (Princeton KDD 2024, arxiv.org/abs/2311.09735).
